mapper.select: SELECT no, subject, name, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as dbday, hit FROM mvcdataboard ORDER BY no DESC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(no)+1,1) as no FROM mvcdataboard
INSERT INTO mvcdataboard(no,name,subject,content,pwd,filename,filesize) VALUES(#{no},#{name}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{pwd}, #{filename},#{filesize})
mapper.select: SELECT pwd FROM mvcdataboard WHERE no=#{no}
mapper.update: UPDATE mvcdataboard SET hit=hit+1 WHERE no=#{no}
mapper.select: SELECT no, name, subject, content, TO_CHAR(regdate, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as dbday, filename, filesize, hit FROM mvcdataboard WHERE no=#{no}
